description: Verify hardware detection works after NVIDIA driver removal
command: echo '=== GPU Detection ===' && lspci | grep -i vga; echo '=== NVIDIA packages status ===' && dpkg -l | grep -i nvidia || echo 'No NVIDIA packages'; echo '=== Detect script test ===' && bash /srv/local-model-pilot/detect-hardware.sh 2>&1 | head -20 || echo 'Script not found'; echo '=== Ollama status ===' && ollama --version && ollama list
